final:
module top_module(
  input [3:0] A,
  input [3:0] B,
  output [3:0] SUM
);assign SUM = A + B;

  always @*
  begin
    if (SUM > 15)
    begin
      $display("Error: Sum is greater than 15");
    end
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (SUM <= 15) begin
        $display("Error: Sum is not greater than 15");
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
